Level.name: Data Source Cost per TB Currency
Data Source Cost per TB Price

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "PageCount" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "PageCount" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN 1 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN 2 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN 3 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 21 AND 100 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "PageCount" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "PageCount" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN '1–2' WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3–5' WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN '6–20' WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 21 AND 100 THEN '21–100' ELSE '101+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "DocumentSize" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "DocumentSize" < 100*1024 THEN 1 WHEN "DocumentSize" < 1024*1024 THEN 2 WHEN "DocumentSize" < 10*1024*1024 THEN 3 WHEN "DocumentSize" < 100*1024*1024 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "DocumentSize" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "DocumentSize" < 100*1024 THEN '<100 KB' WHEN "DocumentSize" < 1024*1024 THEN '100 KB–1 MB' WHEN "DocumentSize" < 10*1024*1024 THEN '1–10 MB' WHEN "DocumentSize" < 100*1024*1024 THEN '10–100 MB' ELSE '>100 MB' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Size" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "Size" < 100*1024 THEN 1 WHEN "Size" < 1024*1024 THEN 2 WHEN "Size" < 10*1024*1024 THEN 3 WHEN "Size" < 100*1024*1024 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Size" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "Size" < 100*1024 THEN '<100 KB' WHEN "Size" < 1024*1024 THEN '100 KB–1 MB' WHEN "Size" < 10*1024*1024 THEN '1–10 MB' WHEN "Size" < 100*1024*1024 THEN '10–100 MB' ELSE '>100 MB' END

Hierarchy.allMemberName: All Total Child File Size Bands

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024 THEN 1 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 100*1024*1024 THEN 2 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 1024*1024*1024 THEN 3 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024*1024 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024 THEN '<10 MB' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 100*1024*1024 THEN '10–100 MB' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 1024*1024*1024 THEN '100 MB–1 GB' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024*1024 THEN '1–10 GB' ELSE '>10 GB' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "RowCount" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "RowCount" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000 THEN 1 WHEN "RowCount" <= 10000 THEN 2 WHEN "RowCount" <= 100000 THEN 3 WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000000 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "RowCount" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "RowCount" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000 THEN '1–1K' WHEN "RowCount" <= 10000 THEN '1K–10K' WHEN "RowCount" <= 100000 THEN '10K–100K' WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000000 THEN '100K–1M' ELSE '1M+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalTables" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "TotalTables" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "TotalTables" <= 10 THEN 1 WHEN "TotalTables" <= 50 THEN 2 WHEN "TotalTables" <= 200 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalTables" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "TotalTables" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "TotalTables" <= 10 THEN '1–10' WHEN "TotalTables" <= 50 THEN '11–50' WHEN "TotalTables" <= 200 THEN '51–200' ELSE '201+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalColumns" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "TotalColumns" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 50 THEN 1 WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 200 THEN 2 WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 1000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalColumns" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "TotalColumns" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 50 THEN '1–50' WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 200 THEN '51–200' WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 1000 THEN '201–1000' ELSE '1001+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Words" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "Words" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "Words" <= 200 THEN 1 WHEN "Words" <= 1000 THEN 2 WHEN "Words" <= 5000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Words" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "Words" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "Words" <= 200 THEN '1–200' WHEN "Words" <= 1000 THEN '201–1K' WHEN "Words" <= 5000 THEN '1K–5K' ELSE '5K+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Characters" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "Characters" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "Characters" <= 1000 THEN 1 WHEN "Characters" <= 5000 THEN 2 WHEN "Characters" <= 20000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Characters" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "Characters" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "Characters" <= 1000 THEN '1–1K' WHEN "Characters" <= 5000 THEN '1K–5K' WHEN "Characters" <= 20000 THEN '5K–20K' ELSE '20K+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "ChildFiles" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "ChildFiles" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 10 THEN 1 WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 100 THEN 2 WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 1000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "ChildFiles" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "ChildFiles" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 10 THEN '1–10' WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 100 THEN '11–100' WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 1000 THEN '101–1K' ELSE '1K+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "ChildDirs" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "ChildDirs" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "ChildDirs" <= 10 THEN 1 WHEN "ChildDirs" <= 100 THEN 2 WHEN "ChildDirs" <= 1000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "ChildDirs" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "ChildDirs" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "ChildDirs" <= 10 THEN '1–10' WHEN "ChildDirs" <= 100 THEN '11–100' WHEN "ChildDirs" <= 1000 THEN '101–1K' ELSE '1K+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "PageCount" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "PageCount" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN 1 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN 2 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN 3 WHEN "PageCount" BETWEEN 21 AND 100 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024 THEN 1 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 100*1024*1024 THEN 2 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 1024*1024*1024 THEN 3 WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024*1024 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024 THEN '<10 MB' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 100*1024*1024 THEN '10–100 MB' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 1024*1024*1024 THEN '100 MB–1 GB' WHEN "TotalChildFileSize" < 10*1024*1024*1024 THEN '1–10 GB' ELSE '>10 GB' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "RowCount" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "RowCount" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000 THEN 1 WHEN "RowCount" <= 10000 THEN 2 WHEN "RowCount" <= 100000 THEN 3 WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000000 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "RowCount" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "RowCount" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000 THEN '1–1K' WHEN "RowCount" <= 10000 THEN '1K–10K' WHEN "RowCount" <= 100000 THEN '10K–100K' WHEN "RowCount" <= 1000000 THEN '100K–1M' ELSE '1M+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalTables" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "TotalTables" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "TotalTables" <= 10 THEN 1 WHEN "TotalTables" <= 50 THEN 2 WHEN "TotalTables" <= 200 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalTables" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "TotalTables" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "TotalTables" <= 10 THEN '1–10' WHEN "TotalTables" <= 50 THEN '11–50' WHEN "TotalTables" <= 200 THEN '51–200' ELSE '201+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalColumns" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "TotalColumns" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 50 THEN 1 WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 200 THEN 2 WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 1000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "TotalColumns" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "TotalColumns" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 50 THEN '1–50' WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 200 THEN '51–200' WHEN "TotalColumns" <= 1000 THEN '201–1000' ELSE '1001+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Words" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "Words" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "Words" <= 200 THEN 1 WHEN "Words" <= 1000 THEN 2 WHEN "Words" <= 5000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Words" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "Words" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "Words" <= 200 THEN '1–200' WHEN "Words" <= 1000 THEN '201–1K' WHEN "Words" <= 5000 THEN '1K–5K' ELSE '5K+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Characters" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "Characters" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "Characters" <= 1000 THEN 1 WHEN "Characters" <= 5000 THEN 2 WHEN "Characters" <= 20000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "Characters" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "Characters" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "Characters" <= 1000 THEN '1–1K' WHEN "Characters" <= 5000 THEN '1K–5K' WHEN "Characters" <= 20000 THEN '5K–20K' ELSE '20K+' END

KeyExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "ChildFiles" IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN "ChildFiles" = 0 THEN 0 WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 10 THEN 1 WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 100 THEN 2 WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 1000 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

NameExpression.SQL: CASE WHEN "ChildFiles" IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' WHEN "ChildFiles" = 0 THEN '0' WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 10 THEN '1–10' WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 100 THEN '11–100' WHEN "ChildFiles" <= 1000 THEN '101–1K' ELSE '1K+' END
